data.name: AssetsDownloadError2ndPart
data.value: . Please retry later. If the issue persists, please contact the plugin developer.

data.name: ConfigVersionUpgradeRecommendedMessage
data.value: Your saved Echoglossian configuration is from an older version. We migrated it, but reviewing and reconfiguring the plugin is recommended.

data.name: TranslationBlockedByEngineConfigurationNotificationText
data.value: Translation is currently disabled because the selected translation engine still needs to be configured. Open the configuration window and finish the engine setup.

data.name: TranslationBlockedByMissingAssetsNotificationText
data.value: Translation is currently disabled because the selected language requires extra font assets. Open the configuration window to download or validate the required files.

data.name: ContribText
data.value: Please support us either by contributing to the project development, submitting issues or helping us with a coffee.

data.name: DisclaimerText1
data.value: This plugin is aimed at solving one of the biggest issues for audiences that do not speak either English, German, French or Japanese: Understanding dialogues and other elements of the Game UI.

data.name: DisclaimerText2
data.value: For now we only do auto-translations through Google Translate API, but in the future we intend to support other ML translation systems. We even have ideas targetting crowdsourced translations, curated by the community.

data.name: DownloadingAssetsPopupMsg
data.value: Downloading extra plugin assets in background. Please wait for the download to finish before opening settings!

data.name: ImguiAdjustmentsLabel
data.value: Adjust the options related to the Plugin Overlay:

data.name: LangIdentError
data.value: The language could not be identified with an acceptable degree of certainty

data.name: LanguageNotSupportedText
data.value: The selected language is not supported by the currently available translation backend

data.name: LanguageOnlySupportedUsingOverlay
data.value: The selected language is only supported using Plugin Overlays due to limitations of the native game font

data.name: LanguageSelectionTooltip
data.value: Which language to translate the in-game dialogue boxes to.

data.name: NEListText
data.value: The non-exhaustive list of issues and TODOs is available in the link below:

data.name: OverlayAdjustmentOrientations
data.value: Please adjust the position if your Plugin Overlay is not centered relative to the game's UI text box.

data.name: OverlayFontColorOrientations
data.value: Click to choose the Plugin Overlay font color

data.name: OverlayFontScaleLabel
data.value: Adjust the Plugin Overlay font scale

data.name: OverlayFontSizeOrientations
data.value: Select the font size for the Plugin Overlay text

data.name: OverlayToggleLabel
data.value: Display translated text in a Plugin Overlay above the game UI text box instead of replacing its text with the translation

data.name: OverlayForceShowTitleToggleLabel
data.value: Show a Plugin Overlay title bar with speaker name when available

data.name: PathInputInstructions
data.value: Absolute path to Echoglossian folder (inside XIVLauncher -> pluginConfigs folder)

data.name: PathTypeInstructions
data.value: Please type the path and save so the plugin can work properly!

data.name: PixText
data.value: Scan the QR code to send me a PIX - only valid in Brazil

data.name: PluginInterfaceLanguage
data.value: Choose the language for the plugin configuration window

data.name: QRCodeInstructionsText
data.value: Scan the QR code to send me a PIX - only valid in Brazil

data.name: SettingsReset
data.value: Echoglossian settings reset to default successfully!

data.name: SwapTranslationTextToggle
data.value: Show original dialogue text in a Plugin Overlay and translated text in the game UI dialogue box

data.name: TranslateAreaToastToggleText
data.value: Translate in-game Area name Toast Messages

data.name: TranslateClassChangeToastToggleText
data.value: Translate in-game Class/Job change Toast Messages

data.name: TranslateNpcNamesToggle
data.value: Translate NPCs names in dialogue boxes

data.name: TranslateScreenInfoToastToggleText
data.value: Translate other in-game miscellaneous Toast Messages

data.name: TranslationEngineSettingsNotRequired
data.value: This translation engine does not require any special settings.

data.name: UseImGuiForToastsToggle
data.value: Use a Plugin Overlay to show toast translations (WIP)

data.name: WhatToTranslateText
data.value: Select what kind of text you want to be translated in the corresponding tab below!

data.name: WhichToastsToTranslate
data.value: Select which kind of in-game message toasts to translate

data.name: PluginAssetsNotDownloadedText
data.value: If you see garbled text or invalid characters in the translation window it is an indicative that some plugin asset fonts may be missing or corrupted. Clicking the button below triggers an asset check and re-downloads them.

data.name: TranslationRequiresDownloadedAssetsText
data.value: This language requires extra downloadable font assets before translation can be enabled.

data.name: TranslationBlockedByEngineConfigurationText
data.value: Configure the selected translation engine before enabling translation.

data.name: LanguageAssetsPopupBodyFormat
data.value: {0} requires one or more external font assets before Echoglossian can translate safely.

data.name: LanguageAssetsPopupAutoDownloadHint
data.value: An automatic background download was triggered when possible. If it fails, use the controls below to place the files manually and recheck them.

data.name: LanguageAssetsTroubleshootingSummaryFormat
data.value: The selected language "{0}" depends on downloaded font assets. Manual files should be placed in: {1}

data.name: ConfigTab9CheckboxClipboardText
data.value: Automatically copy the last translation to the Plugin Clipboard

data.name: ConfigTab9CheckboxClipboardTooltipText
data.value: This setting copies the last translation and source text to the clipboard (Works with Talk and BattleTalk)

data.name: TranslateJournalToggle
data.value: Translate quest name, description and objectives (WIP)

data.name: DeepLTranslatorAPIKeyLink
data.value: Click here to create a DeepL API Key

data.name: TranslateTextsAgain
data.value: Translate again stored translated texts with the selected translation engine

data.name: ChatGPTAPIKeyLink
data.value: Click here to create a OpenAi API Key

data.name: RemoveDiacriticsToggle
data.value: Parse the translated text replacing diacritics with their common letter equivalents

data.name: APIKeyIsEmptyOrInvalidChatGPTTranslationWillNotBeAvailable
data.value: API Key is empty or invalid. ChatGPT translation will not be available.

data.name: ChatGPTTranslationUnavailablePleaseCheckYourAPIKey
data.value: [ChatGPT translation unavailable. Please check your API key.]

data.name: APIKeyIsEmptyOrInvalidClaudeTranslationWillNotBeAvailable
data.value: API Key is empty or invalid. Claude translation will not be available.

data.name: ClaudeTranslationUnavailablePleaseCheckYourAPIKey
data.value: [Claude translation unavailable. Please check your API key.]

data.name: DeepSeekTranslationUnavailablePleaseCheckYourAPIKey
data.value: [DeepSeek translation unavailable. Please check your API key.]

data.name: APIKeyIsEmptyOrInvalidDeepSeekTranslationWillNotBeAvailable
data.value: API Key is empty or invalid. DeepSeek translation will not be available.

data.name: APIKeyIsEmptyOrInvalidGeminiTranslationWillNotBeAvailable
data.value: API Key is empty or invalid. Gemini translation will not be available.

data.name: GeminiTranslationUnavailablePleaseCheckYourAPIKey
data.value: [Gemini translation unavailable. Please check your API key.]

data.name: APIKeyIsEmptyOrInvalidMicrosoftTranslationWillNotBeAvailable
data.value: API Key is empty or invalid. Microsoft translation will not be available.

data.name: MicrosoftTranslationUnavailablePleaseCheckYourAPIKey
data.value: [Microsoft translation unavailable. Please check your API key.]

data.name: CustomizeThePromptUsedForTranslationAllOfTheFollowingPlaceholdersAreRequired
data.value: Customize the prompt used for translation. All of the following placeholders are required:

data.name: MissingOneOrMoreRequiredPlaceholders
data.value: ⚠ Missing one or more required placeholders!

data.name: ResetSettingsMessageText
data.value: You can reset Echoglossian's configuration to default using the button below:

data.name: NoSettingsForEngine
data.value: No settings required for this engine

data.name: AreYouSureYouWantToResetAllSettingsToDefault
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?

data.name: ResetSettingsToDefault
data.value: Reset ALL Echoglossian Settings to Default

data.name: CryptoQRCodeInstructionsText
data.value: Scan the QR Code to send cryptocurrency. Any amount is appreciated :)

data.name: UnableToLoadEntityForEditing
data.value: Unable to load entity for editing.

data.name: NoRecordsFoundInThisTable
data.value: No records found in this table.

data.name: SelectATableToViewItsRecords
data.value: Select a table to view its records.

data.name: TipDoubleClickARowToEdit
data.value: Tip: Double-click a row to edit.

data.name: AcceptedQuestPrefetchStartedNotification
data.value: Background quest pre-translation started for {0} accepted quests.

data.name: AcceptedQuestPrefetchCompletedNotification
data.value: Background quest pre-translation finished for {0} accepted quests.

data.name: ToDoListAwaitingQuestDataNotification
data.value: ToDoList is waiting for stored quest data for {0} visible quests. The addon will stay untouched until all quest data is ready.

data.name: ScenarioTreeAwaitingQuestDataNotification
data.value: ScenarioTree is waiting for stored quest data for {0} visible quests. The addon will stay untouched until all quest data is ready.

data.name: ShowQuestProgressNotificationsDescription
data.value: Shows informational notifications when background quest pre-translation starts or when quest windows are still waiting for stored quest data. Disabled by default to avoid noisy popups during normal gameplay.

data.name: AddonProbeHelpMessage
data.value: Dumps a recursive addon structure probe to the log. Usage: /egloaddonprobe <addon name> [index] or /egloaddonprobe stop

data.name: QuestProbeHelpMessage
data.value: Dumps a full quest data probe to the log. Usage: /egloquestprobe <quest name or quest id>

data.name: JournalQuestDisplayModeNativeUiTranslationWithOriginalTooltips
data.value: Native UI translation + original Plugin Tooltips

data.name: JournalQuestDisplayModeDescription
data.value: This mode controls Journal, ToDoList, RecommendList, ScenarioTree, AreaMap, JournalAccept, and JournalResult. Journal Plugin Tooltips follow this mode directly; the global Plugin Tooltip toggle only affects other translated UI.

data.name: JournalGlobalHoverTooltipsLabel
data.value: Enable global Plugin Tooltips for other translated UI

data.name: QuestDisplayModeNativeUiTranslationWithOriginalTooltips
data.value: Native UI translation + original Plugin Tooltips

data.name: QuestDisplayModeDescription
data.value: This mode controls how this quest window is presented. Native UI writes the translation into the addon, Plugin Tooltip translation only keeps the addon intact, and Native UI translation + original Plugin Tooltips writes the translation natively while showing the original in Plugin Tooltips.

data.name: ToastModeDescription
data.value: Each toast type can choose independently between native replacement and Plugin Overlay rendering.

data.name: ToastModeSwapDescription
data.value: When a toast type uses Plugin Overlay mode, you can also swap the texts so the Plugin Overlay keeps the original line while the native toast shows the translation.

data.name: OverlayOnlyLanguageActiveAllToastTypesWillRenderThroughOverlays
data.value: Plugin Overlay-only language support is active, so all toast types will render through Plugin Overlays.

data.name: OverlayOnlyLanguageActiveThisToastTypeWillRenderThroughAnOverlay
data.value: Plugin Overlay-only language support is active, so this toast type will render through a Plugin Overlay.

data.name: NativeReplacementModeIsActiveForThisToastTypeOverlayStyleControlsAreNotUsedInThisMode
data.value: Native replacement mode is active for this toast type. Plugin Overlay style controls are not used in this mode.

data.name: ToastOverlayUseOverlayForThisToastTypeLabel
data.value: Use a Plugin Overlay for this toast type

data.name: CutSceneSelectStringOverlayHelpText
data.value: The question is used as the window title and the options are rendered one per line.

data.name: ToastOverlayBackgroundOpacityTooltip
data.value: Controls how opaque the toast Plugin Overlay background should be. Use 0 for a fully transparent background.

data.name: OverlayDisplayModeDescription
data.value: This mode controls how the translated text is presented. Native UI writes directly into the game addon, Plugin Overlay translation only leaves the native addon untouched, and Native UI translation + original Plugin Overlay writes the translation natively while showing the original in the Plugin Overlay.

data.name: OverlayDisplayModeNativeUiTranslationWithOriginalOverlay
data.value: Native UI translation + original Plugin Overlay

data.name: OverlayOnlyLanguageModeDescription
data.value: The selected language does not support the native game font, so this surface is limited to Plugin Overlays and Plugin Tooltips.

data.name: ActionAndItemTooltipsDisplayModeDescription
data.value: This mode controls the ActionDetail and ItemDetail surfaces. Native UI writes the translated detail text into the game addon, Plugin Overlay translation only keeps the native addon intact and uses Plugin Overlays, and Native UI translation + original Plugin Overlay writes the translation natively while showing the original in our Plugin Overlay.

data.name: HoverTooltipAppearanceDescription
data.value: These colors apply to Plugin Tooltips used by quest and DB-first UI surfaces.

data.name: CouldNotFetchOllamaModels
data.value: Could not fetch models. Is Ollama running locally?

data.name: ActionAndItemTooltipsToggleLabel
data.value: Enable action/item detail translation and shared Plugin Tooltips

data.name: OllamaEngineUiFailedToRender
data.value: Ollama engine UI failed to render.

data.name: ChatGptModelTooltipGpt4
data.value: 🧠 More capable but slower and costly

data.name: GeminiModelTooltip15Pro
data.value: 🟢 Large context window and high accuracy

data.name: DeepSeekModelTooltipChat
data.value: 💬 Optimized for general chat and speed

data.name: ClaudeModelTooltipSonnet4
data.value: Balanced quality, latency, and cost for general translation.

data.name: ClaudeModelTooltipSonnet37
data.value: Strong general-purpose Claude alias with broad capability.

data.name: ClaudeModelTooltipHaiku35
data.value: Fastest Claude tier for lower latency and lower cost.

data.name: ClaudeModelTooltipOpus41
data.value: Highest-tier Claude model when you want maximum quality.
